creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: As of FreeBSD 12 revision 322823 this is no longer reproducible.  However, its still possible to hit deadlocks when building zpools atop zvols (see https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=294329).  So that feature is gated by the off-by-default sysctl vfs.zfs.vol.recursive.
